messages.content: Bot1 <MESSAGE>: Hey Bot2, we're both at ground level with no hostiles spawned yet. I have a stone sword, bow with arrows, leather tunic, bread, and oak planks. Should we gather in one area to make coordinated defense easier when hostiles start spawning?

Bot2 <Event>: I have picked up:
- 1 Stone Sword
- 1 Bow
- 24 Arrow
- 1 Leather Tunic
- 12 Bread
- 40 Oak Planks

arguments.name: move_to_gathering_point
arguments.description: Move to a central coordinate between Bot1 and Bot2 for coordinated defense

messages.content: Me <NEW ACTION>: Created move_to_gathering_point and executed it with {"partnerName":"Bot2","radius":1}. <MOVING>: Calculating midpoint between self and Bot2 at (1.5, 0.0, 0.5) and moving there.

Bot2 <Event>: Multiple new hostile mobs are approaching:
- zombie id 16 is 3.3 blocks away
- zombie id 17 is 2.4 blocks away

Me <ALREADY FULL>: Hunger is already full at 20.
